arts.ttl: The curious case of Daniel Cummings as Celtic kid given UEFA Youth League run after deadline day snub
arts.sum: Daniel Cummings starts for Celtic B in UEFA Youth League Cummings could have left Celtic on deadline day for £500k

arts.ttl: Special Saturday looms for Bayern Munich, Bayer Leverkusen in Bundesliga clash
arts.sum: ESPN+ will have special coverage of the Leverkusen-Bayern „Spitzenspiel“ on Saturday. That clash is in the form of a road trip to defending champions Bayer Leverkusen on Saturday, February 15.

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Bayern Munich LIVE: Champions League team news and line-ups ahead of play-off tie
arts.sum: The German giants come to Glasgow for the first leg of a tricky tie for Brendan Rodgers’s side

arts.ttl: Shay Given cheekily mentions Rangers' Queen's Park defeat to highlight Celtic financial strength over rivals
arts.sum: Shay Given brought up Rangers’ loss to Queen’s Park in the same breath as Celtic vs Bayern Munich “This new format, the new way in the Champions League, has been refreshing for Celtic but also if you think of the revenue that’s generated, it’ll help them next season.

arts.ttl: German media dismiss Celtic chances vs Bayern Munich as disrespect reaches new heights
arts.sum: But now the official Bundesliga website channel has outlined “five reasons why Bayern Munich will progress against Celtic in the UEFA Champions League “. The Bundesliga has written off Celtic vs Bayern Munich

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany's claim about Virgil van Dijk in 2019 is looking more and more true with time - opinion
arts.sum: John Terry did not agree whatsoever 🤬

arts.ttl: Celtic vs Bayern Munich referee sparked backlash with post-match act and sent off Lionel Messi
arts.sum: As Brendan Rodgers' side prepare to welcome European giants Bayern Munich to Parkhead, the match officials will be looking to keep controversy to a minimum

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany recalls facing Brendan Rodgers as player and tells how that may impact Bayern Munich vs Celtic
arts.sum: Kompany was a player when his Manchester City side faced Leicester and Liverpool during Rodgers ‘ time down south and the Belgian knows how dramatically different life is as a player and then as a coach. “I think the depth of analysis you go into as a coach is slightly different than as a player,” Kompany said.

arts.ttl: Vincent Kompany prepared for Bayern Munich’s Champions League scrum with Celtic
arts.sum: “I think we’re playing against a team that is used to winning a lot and settling days with their attack. Bayern Munich head coach Vincent Kompany can look at Celtic and see the confidence the Scottish team shows on the pitch.

arts.ttl: Celtic can unlock mega Champions League cash bonanza with seismic Bayern Munich upset
arts.sum: The cash-rich Parkhead club have already raked in a fortune this season but another massive windfall awaits in the last 16
